programme.title: My Mom's New Boyfriend
programme.desc: After several years away, FBI agent Henry Durand (Colin Hanks) returns to find his mother, Marty (Meg Ryan), a much different person: Having long mourned for Henry's father, she is now embracing single life. One day, while Marty, Henry and his new fiancée, Emily (Selma Blair), are out for a walk, they meet Tommy (Antonio Banderas), a mysterious stranger, with whom Marty then becomes involved. However, through his FBI contacts, Henry learns that Tommy is suspected of being an art thief.

programme.title: On the Edge
programme.desc: When a young basketball player becomes entangled with drug dealers, he turns to an ex-cop and former private eye. Starring Ice-T, Gary Busey, Fred Williamson and Jim Brown.

programme.title: Life of a King
programme.desc: An ex-felon on a path of redemption defies convention and establishes a Chess Club for inner-city teenagers.

programme.title: Killing Season
programme.desc: Oscar winner Robert De Niro ("Raging Bull") and Oscar nominee John Travolta ("Pulp Fiction") star as two Bosnian War veterans hunting each other in this thrilling game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: Tuff Turf
programme.desc: The new kid in school must battle a gang of tough street kids after stealing the gang leader's girl. Starring James Spader, Kim Richards and Robert Downey Jr.

programme.title: Take Me Home Tonight
programme.desc: Four years after graduation, an awkward high school genius uses his sister's boyfriend's Labor Day party

programme.title: Jobs
programme.desc: The story of Steve Jobs' ascension from college dropout into one of the most revered creative entrepreneurs of the 20th century

programme.title: Limitless
programme.desc: A mysterious pill that enables the user to access 100% of his brain's abilities transforms a struggling writer into a financial wizard, but it also puts him in a new world with many dangers.

programme.title: The Loft
programme.desc: Five men share a loft for affairs; a woman’s body changes everything.

programme.title: The China Syndrome
programme.desc: A reporter finds what appears to be a cover-up of safety hazards at a nuclear power plant.

programme.title: The Myth Of Fingerprints
programme.desc: Four adult children return for Thanksgiving to their New England home--and their parents--after a three-year absence. Throughout the weekend, the children and their parents realize what they must give up in order to move on with their lives.

programme.title: Kabluey
programme.desc: A man is forced to work as a corporate mascot dressing up in a big blue costume.

programme.title: Made Of Honor
programme.desc: Tom leads a good life: he’s sexy, he’s successful, and he knows he can always rely on Hannah, his delightful best friend and the one constant in his life. It’s the perfect setup until Hannah goes overseas to Scotland on a six-week business trip… and Tom is stunned to realize how empty his life is without her. He resolves that upon her return, he ll ask Hannah to marry him – but is floored when he learns that she has become engaged to a handsome and wealthy Scotsman and plans to move overseas. When Hannah asks Tom to be her "maid" of honor, he reluctantly agrees to fill the role… but only so he can attempt to woo Hannah and stop the wedding before it’s too late.

programme.title: That Awkward Moment
programme.desc: In THAT AWKWARD MOMENT, three guys in support of a friend devastated by a recent breakup vow to maintain their single status for as long as possible. The plan gets derailed when they each fall in love and have to secretly work around their pledge to bachelorhood, while trying to figure out the complications of modern day relationships.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: The escape of Bubber Reeves from prison affects the inhabitants of a small Southern town.

programme.title: The Three Stooges In Orbit
programme.desc: The Three Stooges are tangling with Martians.

programme.title: The Whole Truth
programme.desc: Movie producer Granger is bored in his marriage to Reed. He has an affair with Canale, a temperamental actress, but decides he prefers Reed's company. After he dumps Canale, detective tells him that the star has been stabbed, and all clues point toward Granger as the killer.

programme.title: A Man For All Seasons
programme.desc: Dramatic depiction of the conflict between Henry VIII and Sir Thomas More. Winner of six Oscars, including Best Picture (1966), best director (Fred Zinnemann), and best actor (Paul Scofield).

programme.title: Under The Yum Yum Tree
programme.desc: A couple in love agree to determine their "character compatability" by living together platonically.

programme.title: Seobok: Project Clone

programme.title: Dr. Cheon and Lost Talisman

A mysterious client hires him for a possession case, drawing Dr. Cheon into a series of unexplainable events that challenges his beliefs and revives childhood horrors he's tried to forget.

programme.desc: Teen witnesses mother's shooting, hides with a cop, facing danger as they evade the killer together.

programme.desc: Baseball coach Murph needs a miracle to save the team. Pitcher Micky with Aspergers may be the answer.

programme.title: Be Mine
programme.desc: A woman finds romance as she prepares to take over her mother's garden store.

programme.title: Love at the Ranch
programme.desc: Sparks fly between a big-city reporter and a ranch owner as she researches the life of a romance novelist.

programme.title: Edison
programme.desc: Ambitious young reporter Pollack (Justin Timberlake) suspects insidious corruption in his town's elite police unit, known as F.R.A.T., and finds a friendly source in Deed (LL Cool J), a dissatisfied member of the squad. With Deed's information and the backing of his publisher, Ashford (Morgan Freeman), and a crusading lawyer, Wallace (Kevin Spacey), Pollack infiltrates the secretive police cabal. He finds himself in over his head, however, when he discovers the true extent of the criminality.

programme.title: Falcon Rising
programme.desc: Chapman is an ex-marine in Brazil's slums, battling the yakuza outfit who attacked his sister and left her for dead.

programme.title: Call Her King
programme.desc: After sentencing a notorious gangster to death, Judge Jaeda King must rely on her wits, strength and skill when her courtroom is taken over by force by the prisoner's brother.

programme.title: CODE
programme.desc: Dallas artist MALIK SCHAEFER, also known as CODE, is a rising star in the underground rap scene. Although his checkered past has led him down the wrong road at times, with the help of his best friend, STYLES, Malik is back on the fast-track to success. That is, until he reconnects with the dangerous love of his life, SOPHIA ORTEGA, who threatens to destroy it all. Malik must decide to either follow his heart or live by the code that has served him well for many years: family over everything.

programme.title: Blessed & Cursed
programme.desc: Pain, Deceit and Triumph are just some of the plots twists that viewers will experience in this highly anticipated movie! A modern retelling of the dramatic Biblical account of Saul and David, Blessed & Cursed stars Gospel sensation Deitrick Haddon in his first theatrical debut as Dwight Hawkins an incredibly gifted young man who is in search of his purpose amid setbacks and unexpected surprises!

programme.title: CODE
programme.desc: Dallas artist MALIK SCHAEFER, also known as CODE, is a rising star in the underground rap scene. Although his checkered past has led him down the wrong road at times, with the help of his best friend, STYLES, Malik is back on the fast-track to success. That is, until he reconnects with the dangerous love of his life, SOPHIA ORTEGA, who threatens to destroy it all. Malik must decide to either follow his heart or live by the code that has served him well for many years: family over everything.

programme.title: Commandments of a Female Hustler
programme.desc: Three childhood friends, Lala, Binky, and Jay grew up together on the streets of East Baltimore. Wanting a better life for themselves, they learn the ways of hustling. When they align themselves with one of the most powerful drug dealers in the game, their loyalties are tested, and the very commandments that once bound them start to break.

programme.title: Deadly Squatters
programme.desc: Eugene and Laura return home from vacation to find that two young siblings have taken up residence in their home, and have now claimed legal rights as squatters. Forced to share their home with two strangers, they must play their wicked games and survive psychological terror as the legal system takes its time.

programme.title: The Agony and the Ecstasy
programme.desc: When rival gangster Derrick Smith is released from prison, the beef with Armand Rossi explodes into an all-out war in Fountain City, MO. After a hit on his family , Armand goes into killer mode. Derrick and Vic Moore team up for revenge , but Rossi and his partner Qua stay ahead. When they involve Dr. Monica Gaye in the plot , she flips the script to survive. A devastating loss sends a grieving Armand past the point of no return , forcing him to eliminate every one of his opps.

programme.title: Disaster Strike Force
programme.desc: A devastating deep freeze threatens the East Coast.

programme.title: Asteroid Vs Earth
programme.desc: When meteors threaten Earth's extinction, its greatest minds devise a plan to tilt the planet off its axis.

programme.title: Triassic World
programme.desc: Dinosaurs used to grow human organs for transplants escape. The scientists that created them must fight back.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Mack and Addy find themselves trapped by a zombie who they just can't kill.

programme.title: Ice Sharks
programme.desc: As scientists study the effects of climate change on sea life, a new breed of shark breaks through.

programme.title: 6 Guns
programme.desc: After a woman’s family is slaughtered, she hires a gunslinger to teach her how to shoot to take vengeance.

programme.title: Cannibal Ferox (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Here it is! The original uncensored, unrated director's cut of one of the most notorious and violent films of all time. Banned in 31 countries, Cannibal Ferox assaults your senses as a group of Americans lost in the jungles of Amazonia experience brutal retribution at the hands of savage cannibals. Shot on location in the savage Amazon wilds of South America, CANNIBAL FEROX is one of the most violent and shocking films ever made. There are at least two dozen scenes of barbaric torture and sadistic cruelty graphically shown. This is the legendary Grindhouse Releasing edition of Umberto Lenzi's infamous classic of graphic horror.

programme.title: The Island
programme.desc: As Mikkel loses his handle on the island and people ignore the restrictions, events begin to spiral out of control.

programme.title: The Island
programme.desc: After Evelin confesses her pregnancy, she is found to be resistant to the virus, which leads her to a mainland hospital and a shocking discovery.

programme.title: The Island
programme.desc: As Mikkel loses his handle on the island and people ignore the restrictions, events begin to spiral out of control.

programme.title: The Island
programme.desc: After Evelin confesses her pregnancy, she is found to be resistant to the virus, which leads her to a mainland hospital and a shocking discovery.

programme.title: It Hatched
programme.desc: A couple moves from Nashville to a remote fjord in Iceland in search of peace and serenity. Their plans are horrifically altered when an ancient demon escapes from under their basement floor and Mira gives birth to an egg.

programme.title: Hatchet III
programme.desc: In the epic third installment of Adam Greens slasher franchise, Marybeth (Danielle Harris, Halloween) uncovers the true secret to stopping the voodoo curse that has left the ghost of deformed maniac Victor Crowley (Kane Hodder, Friday the 13th) stalking the New Orleans bayou for decades. An entire police department, paramedic response team, and heavily armed S.W.A.T. unit face off with the iconic monster in this action-packed and explosive horror comedy. Hatchet III is full of stunts and jaw dropping gore effects that raise both the bar and the body count of the previous two films put together. Also starring genre favorites Zach Galligan (Gremlins), Caroline Williams (Texas Chainsaw Massacre 2), and Derek Mears (Friday the 13th 2009 and Predators).

programme.title: Skull: The Mask
programme.desc: An ancient artifact known as the Mask of Anhangá possesses and forces those who wear it to carry out visceral sacrifices in gruesome fashion in this splatter-filled supernatural slasher.

programme.title: Infested
programme.desc: Facing an invasion of venomous spiders, residents of a suburb building will have to find their way out to survive.

programme.title: Horror's Greatest
programme.desc: Creepy houses, murderous rednecks, final girls: horror films often rely on these tried-and-true storytelling devices, and audiences have come to expect them. What are the most common genre tropes and clichés? How do modern filmmakers subvert them?

programme.title: Horror's Greatest
programme.desc: Nearly a century after King Kong first ran amok, images of giant marauding monsters continue to enthrall us. Godzilla is hotter than ever, and filmmakers like Bong Joon-ho, J.J. Abrams, and Jordan Peele have all added their unique spins to the genre.

programme.title: Horror's Greatest
programme.desc: Veering between slow dread and shocking violence, the wild world of Japanese horror has something for everyone. From Ugetsu to Ring, Onibaba to Audition, Tetsuo to Battle Royale: the greatest J-Horror films are essential viewing for horror fans.

programme.title: Horror's Greatest
programme.desc: Horror comedies make us laugh at things we might recoil from in real life. They come in many flavors, including splatstick (Evil Dead II), high camp (M3GAN), subversive "family entertainment" (Gremlins) and stone-cold classics (Shaun of the Dead).

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Get Psychoanalyzed" - Jethro needs a health certificate to graduate from the fifth grade, so he goes to the only doctor the Clampetts know about - Mrs. Drysdale's psychiatrist. He gets nowhere with Jethro, so Pearl comes and she thinks he is testing her virtue when he tries to lay her on his couch.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts in Court" - When a couple who ran into the Clampett's car discover that they're rich, they fake injuries and sue the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Entertain" - Jed arranges a party to get Grannie out of her doldrums and invites the Drysdale. But when Mr. Drysdale's boss comes and wants to meet them for dinner, he wonders if he's going to be sent to an Alaskan bank when his boss finds out he's been lying about Jed and his family being sophisticated.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.desc: "The Clampetts Meet Mrs Drysdale" - Mr. Drysdale panics when Mrs. Drysdale comes back from Boston early, because she'll meet the Clampetts. He sets Miss Hathaway on a plan to get them to go to Palm Springs. Meanwhile, Grannie and Jed come to think Mrs. Drysdale is a drunk and make plans to cure her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Turkey Day" - Elly bonds with the Thanksgiving turkey so the family can't bring themselves to kill it; Mrs Drysdale hires some Indians to take a Thanksgiving picture, which puts Granny on the warpath.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Chickadee Returns" - Jethro thinks he's in love with Chickadee Laverne, a stripper he met at the bank. She and the Clampetts have meet and have different ideas about what an "engagement" is, while Miss Hathaway tries to avert this disaster.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

Meanwhile, the Clampetts are looking forward to the Possum Day parade, which of course isn't celebrated in Beverly Hills, so Drysdale has to figure out how to have one to keep them happy.

programme.desc: Len Richards and his brother, Ab, confront a Lucas McCain look-alike, Earl Bantry and his sidekick K.C. Peters, for slaughtering one of Richards' steers.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas develops temporary amnesia from a head injury while visiting a strange town and mistakenly assumes the identity of a wanted criminal.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While trapped in the ghost town saloon, Lucas tries to come up with a plan to escape with his son and Micah after Mark refuses to leave without him.

programme.title: Secret Patrol
programme.desc: Charles Starrett plays an agent sent out to the Northwest territory to investigate a rash of logging accidents at a lumber camp. Eventually it is learned that McGowan caused the deaths because he wants control of the company.

programme.title: Battle Of Rogue River
programme.desc: In 1850 Oregon is trying to gain statehood, but a truce is needed with the Indians.

programme.title: 7th Cavalry
programme.desc: Randolph Scott is a man branded a coward for not taking part in Custer's disastrous Battle of Little Bighorn.

programme.title: The Hard Man
programme.desc: A lawman becomes a deputy in a town where he suspects his dead friend was framed for murder.

programme.title: The Longest Drive
programme.desc: Two brothers on a quest to find their long-lost, kidnapped sister, who now lives as part of an Indian tribe.

programme.title: Boots and Saddles
programme.desc: When a young Englishman inherits a ranch, none other than Gene Autry takes up the challenge of turning the Brit into a real westerner. He convinces the Brit to use the ranch to raise horses, but things quickly grow complicated. Look for the usual cast of characters from Republic Pictures, including Smiley Burnette (as the irresistible Frog Millhouse!). Songs include Take Me Back To My Boots and Saddle, and Ridin the Range.

programme.title: Way of the West
programme.desc: Government agent Gordon (Hal Taliaferro) goes undercover to investigate an ongoing war between cattlemen and sheepmen. But he soon finds himself framed for murder! This low budget western from the short-lived Empire Pictures is from the golden era of shoot em ups, when audiences knew who the bad guys were, and couldnt wait for the good guys to serve up some just punishment!

programme.title: Lawless Frontier
programme.desc: John Wayne stars in this vintage western about a man avenging the murder of his parents. Other cast members include frequent Wayne sidekick George 'Gabby Hayes', plus Yakima Canutt, Sheila Terry, and Jack Rockwell. This Paul Malvern Production from director Robert N. Bradbury also features Earl Dwire, one of the great B-movie villains, as Zanti, the ruthless bandit who sets the action in motion.

programme.title: Blue Steel
programme.desc: Undercover US Marshal John Carruthers (John Wayne) is investigating a rash of robberies by a character known as The Polka Dot Bandit in this B-movie gem. Along the way, Carruthers finds himself in more trouble than he'd ever expected! Written and directed by Robert N. Bradbury, the film features George Gabby Hayes, Eleanor Hunt, and many other favorites of the era. Wayne was only 27 at the time of Blue Steel, but was well on his way to becoming The Duke.

programme.title: Between Men
programme.desc: When his young son is shot, John Wellington kills the culprit and flees. But his son Johnny recovers and is raised by Sir George. Some twenty years later Johnny sets out to find Sir George's missing granddaughter. He finds her and also finds Rand, but neither of the two men realize they are father and son.

programme.title: The Fighting Westerner
programme.desc: A mining engineer tries to solve the murders of several heirs to a valuable radium mine in this western drama from Paramount Pictures. Stars include Charles Chic Sale, and in one of his early roles, Randolph Scott. This feature, also known as Rocky Mountain Mystery, was directed by Oscar winner Charles Barton, who would go on to direct several popular television shows, including Petticoat Junction and Family Affair...

programme.title: In Old Colorado
programme.desc: Hopalong Cassidy and his crew get involved in a war over water rights in this feature from Harry Sherman Productions and Paramount Pictures. The intrigue starts when crafty Joe Weller (Morris Ankrum) turns two ranchers against each other, which leads to dire results. This is the 33rd of 66 Hopalong Cassidy movies, with WIlliam Boyd in the role he made famous. Also, look for regular Hoppy co-stars Russell Hayden as Lucky Jenkins, and Andy Clyde as California Carson.

programme.title: Jesse James
programme.desc: Jesse James and his brother Frank race to secure the family's buried gold as members of the James-Younger gang attempt to steal it.

programme.title: Pinkerton
programme.desc: Allan Pinkerton, founder of America's first detective agency, embarks on a mission to capture the notorious outlaw, Jesse James.

programme.title: The Undefeated
programme.desc: Unaware that the Civil War has ended, Col. John Henry Thomas (John Wayne) successfully attacks a Confederate company led by James Langdon (Rock Hudson). With the remnants of Langdon's squadron fleeing to Mexico, Thomas and his adopted Native American son, Blue Boy (Roman Gabriel), gather a herd of horses and head for the border with their company, to sell them. After Langdon's caravan is captured by a Mexican general (Tony Aguilar), Thomas nobly sacrifices the horses to free them.

programme.title: The Ballad Of Lefty Brown
programme.desc: A merciless cowboy sets out on a dangerous journey across the frontier, determined to do whatever it takes to avenge his longtime partner's brutal murder in this thrilling, action-packed western.

programme.desc: Two friends pursue a group of human traffickers that have kidnapped five women in 1874, East Texas.

programme.desc: From homemade elevators to tree forts, tire swings to hang gliders, Bill’s building projects are anything but ordinary. Whether he’s constructing a cement table or turning a tent into a flying machine, these bizarre builds are pure Possum Lodge madness.

programme.title: Adventures With Bill
programme.desc: Red and Bill take on a series of ill-conceived projects involving trees. What starts with Bill's demonstration of unsafe camping lanterns quickly devolves into an attempt to remove a stump using various disastrous methods, including tools, termites, and a rope attached to a neighbor's house. Finally, the pair tries to climb a tree with equally calamitous results, proving that some things are best left to nature.

programme.title: The Red Green Show
programme.desc: Women pursue good health, Men pursue good doctors. Possum Lake's old doctor has retired and his replacement uses a local ice cream parlor as the new Possum Lake Medical Clinic.

programme.title: The Red Green Show
programme.desc: Red discovers that a foster child is at the Lodge to spend the weekend with him.

programme.title: The Red Green Show
programme.desc: Upset over high gas prices, the men of the Lodge switch to electric golf carts.

programme.title: Adventures With Bill
programme.desc: Dive into aquatic adventures with Bill as he explores various water-based activities. From snorkeling mishaps to fishing fiascos, this episode is soaked with Bill’s humorous attempts at mastering the element of water, alongside safety tips gone sideways.

programme.title: The Red Green Show
programme.desc: Harold brings in a shipment of energy bars, which get everyone hooked.

programme.title: Red Green - Bonus Material

programme.title: The Red Green Show
programme.desc: Red attempts to perform a do-it-yourself makeover for the high school reunion.

programme.title: Adventures With Bill
programme.desc: Bill takes on home improvement with his signature flair for the impractical. From building a log cabin and power-washing a friend’s car to installing a pool and inventing a new way to rake leaves, this is a masterclass in DIY disasters. Try these projects at your own risk… or better yet, don’t.

programme.title: The Red Green Show
programme.desc: The Lodge adopts a three-mile curved stretch of highway called "Orphan's Bend".

programme.title: The Red Green Show
programme.desc: Red creates a barbecue sauce/gasoline additive.

programme.title: Red Green - Bonus Material
programme.desc: Classic and never-before-seen moments from The Red Green Show highlighting Red's career as a Duct Tape Virtuoso Deluxe.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show
programme.desc: With a New Orleans–inspired menu now set for his friend Bryan Ford, Dave starts testing out this week’s recipes: barbecue turkey legs, meat pies, coconut flatbread, and coconut beignets.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show
programme.desc: "Preparing for Bryan Ford" - This week's guest, Bryan Ford, is on his way to the studio. With a coconut-heavy menu now locked in, Dave starts making his three-breads-in-one dough, and gets the turkey necks cooking.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show
programme.desc: "Dinner with Bryan Ford" - Our guest this week is Bryan Ford, for whom Dave and Chris Ying have prepared a menu that’s heavy on coconut, devoid of shellfish (Bryan’s allergic), and heavily inspired by New Orleans.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "A Truly Incredible Sweet Potato Pie from Malcolm Livingston II" - Acclaimed pastry chef Malcolm Livingston II shares an absolutely INSANE recipe for sweet potato pie that will blow up everything you thought you know about sweet potato pie. You want those sharp edges that could poke an eye out? Of course you do. And the density! Malcolm describes it "like fudge"...or "a perfect caramel that leaves the teethmarks when you bite through it." It's honestly amazing and you don't even have to take our word for it, you can just make it for yourself. Don't be that person that brings some soggy, sloppy pie to your holiday party...watch this video and take notes!

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "Lisa Donovan's Legendary Pie Crust" - There are pie-makers, and then there's world-renowned pastry chef Lisa Donovan. Lisa blesses the MajordomoTV Studio by taking us step-by-step through her zen-like process of making a perfect, flaky, tender, Southern-style pie crust. The technique! The poetry! The jokes about oversized rolling pins! Lisa is a true master of the pie arts, and if you've ever had ambitions to make your own crust—or just like to zone out watching hands sifting through butter and flour—there's no better place to start than a lesson from Ms. Donovan.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "David Chang recreates his mom's holiday specialty (bindaetteok 빈대떡)" - David Chang recreates his mom's holiday specialty (bindaetteok 빈대떡) - When Dave Chang was growing up, his mom always made mung-bean pancakes with kimchi, scallion, and pork belly for any celebratory dinner. So, as Dave gears up for the holidays, he's trying to channel her culinary energy into his own version of Korean bindaetteok. Try as he might, he just can't get it to taste exactly the same, but isn't that what makes moms special?

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "Chicken Pot Pie from scratch in 45 minutes?! REAL-TIME COOKING" - After a long day of filming in the studio kitchen, Dave Chang wanted one more challenge. For no reason other than to see if he could do it, he attempted the utterly ridiculous task of making chicken pot pie, completely from scratch, in under 45 minutes. This is no BS! Dave enlists his buddy, Chris Ying, to help. The guys have nothing prepped, no plan, and no recipes. Dave’s gonna tackle the crust. Chris is gonna make the filling. The timer starts, and they’re off. WILL THEY MAKE IT HAPPEN?

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia travels to a festival in the Ozarks where she is teaching a cooking class. We follow her as she prepares and gathers her ingredients — we meet a small town chicken farmer, gather produce at the local farmers market, and set the table at a local textile studio where Georgia learns to dye napkins.

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Join Georgia on an urban foraging expedition and learn from an edible and medicinal plants expert as he and Georgia collect a variety of items during a walk through the neighborhood. From flower studded ice cubes, to honeysuckle tea, to dandelion green salad, Georgia is making the most of what is around her.

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Women from around the country convene in west Texas for a transformative experience in the wild. During the episode, Georgia teaches viewers about the different cuts of venison and the ways to cook them, as well as how to save money by grinding your own meat. The guests and viewers will leave feeling empowered and with a different perspective on what it is to be a human and an omnivore.

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia hosts a dinner party at her home in Austin, Texas, focusing on ingredients that are as locally sourced and homemade as possible. Pulling produce from her own garden, she turns it into pickled vegetables, tomato bread salad, a lemon balm cocktail and more! Georgia even decorates the dinner table entirely with items she has found in nature.

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia is in Charleston, South Carolina where she is preparing a dinner at historic Fenwick Hall. She invites a legendary queen of Southern cooking to come by and teach her the secret to her two ingredient biscuits, learns a Nigerian inspired cocktail from a local sommelier, and heads out on the water to harvest oysters. Georgia also shares her tips for setting a southern outdoor table.

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia visits Tuscany to get back to her own roots, and learn about the generations of families who are carrying on their family's traditions, some for centuries. She goes truffle hunting, learns to make fresh pasta, how to taste wine, and samples the incredible cheeses from the sheep grazing in front of her - experiencing the true value in living off the land.

programme.title: Welcome to My Farm
programme.desc: Lisa makes a visit to a lavender farm in Maine to learn all about growing and using the aromatic herb in baking and to make a natural chicken coop spray. Back at home, she bakes lavender cupcakes, makes some ice cream, then makes a chicken-themed cornhole game for the backyard.

programme.title: Welcome to My Farm
programme.desc: Lisa heads to a lobster pound on the coast of Maine for a fresh seafood lunch, then gets some tips on cooking lobster. Back at home, she bakes a Maine favorite sweet treat - Whoopie pies - then builds a curbside stand using wooden pallets to sell fresh eggs and flowers.

programme.title: Welcome to My Farm
programme.desc: Lisa shares some basic cooking tips for scrambling, frying and poaching eggs, as well as her secret for perfectly peeled hard-boiled eggs, and then makes a few of her favorite egg recipes including omelets, Eggs Benedict and her unique twist on deviled eggs. She also explains proper egg storage and why some eggs don't need to be refrigerated.

programme.title: Welcome to My Farm
programme.desc: Lisa visits a local cow farm in search of fresh milk to make homemade ice cream, only to find out that the Scottish Highlands at the farm aren't dairy cows. But the second farm she visits does raise dairy cows, so Lisa tries her hand at milking, then shares bowls of homemade blackberry basil ice cream for a few friends to enjoy after a day on the lake.

programme.title: Welcome to My Farm
programme.desc: Before Lisa heads south to visit the annual holiday light display at the Coastal Maine Botanical Gardens, she shares a favorite childhood sweet treat. Then after enjoying the festivities, she ends the evening with a traditional creme brulee made with her fresh eggs. She also explains why light is so important in a chicken coop and how to handle the lack of light during the long Maine winters.

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia visits the Catskills in New York, where a couple has created a stunning homestead and serves their community through weekly dinners that now attract people from afar. She heads out into the woods, into the root cellar, and into the kitchen with Jake and Elizabeth as they create a beautiful meal for dinner guests. The couple shares how they created this space and offer inspiring ideas for living and entertaining.

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia visits two women who are reclaiming the land that their ancestors once worked, while serving their community through food, farming and ranching. Georgia learns about the ways they are trying to impact and teach others to connect with the land and access healthy food. They roll up their sleeves together in the soil and in the kitchen, making recipes passed down through generations.

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia brings the audience into the kitchen with her to share delicious garden to table recipes. Along the way she pays a visit to an artisan beeswax candle maker who teaches her the art of candle making. Georgia then goes to sit at the pottery wheel with a gifted ceramicist to create candle holders and elements for a table setting.

programme.desc: With the demolition and foundation work out of the way on the Kuppersmith Project, we’re finally ready to start building the addition and renovating the existing exterior to turn our 1926 house into a practical home any family would love to own.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: With the additions to our 1926 Kuppersmith Project house framed up and the roofing on, the next big step was roughing in all the plumbing, wiring, and ductwork so we can get started installing the insulation and drywall in the house.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Next up in our extensive renovation of the 1926 Kuppersmith Project house, we installed foam insulation in the walls and attic, hung drywall, painted the exterior, and began installing the kitchen cabinets.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: The interior of the Kuppersmith Project house is taking shape as the cabinetry, moldings, and heart pine flooring are installed. Plus, we take sneak peak at the finished décor from designer Joe Boehm of Better Homes & Gardens magazine.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: We’re grading the lot and preparing for the driveway on the outside of the Kuppersmith Project house renovation. Meanwhile on the inside, we’re focused on installing the granite and quartz countertops in the kitchen and master bath.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: We’re tackling a number of projects outside on the Kuppersmith house, including installing motorized retractable screens and pouring the concrete driveway. Inside we’re putting in a shower surround and putting down a tile floor in the bathroom.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Work on the Kuppersmith Project – my extensive renovation of a 1926 Tudor style home – kicked into high gear with the sanding and finishing of the antique heart pine floors and installation of a beautiful paver patio.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: From lattice to lawn irrigation, there are a lot of details that have to be addressed when tackling a major renovation like the Kuppersmith Project house.

programme.title: Family Travel with Colleen Kelly

programme.title: Family Travel with Colleen Kelly

programme.title: Family Travel with Colleen Kelly

programme.title: Mythical Roads
programme.desc: It is springtime in the southern hemisphere of Argentina, and here, we explore the timeless lands of Patagonia. Everywhere you turn, this land of extremes reveals more and more of its stark and rugged characteristics to you. Here, memories are burned into your mind by the second.

programme.title: Mythical Roads
programme.desc: Travel down the Amazon River, the largest river on Earth. Encounter young Amazonian boatmen, air-taxi pilots, and the fisherman who live along its tranquil waters, and visit villages such as Marajo, an island where buffalo roam freely, and Manuas, called the "Paris of the Tropics."

programme.title: Mexico One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless

programme.title: Jail

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Two agitated inmates are put in restraints to cool down. A suspected burglar expresses concern over a milk allergy, and an inmate becomes upset about the care given to her belongings.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: In Salt Lake City, UT a combative inmate provokes the use of pepper spray. In Sarasota, FL a drunk woman is uncooperative during processing. In Spokane, WA a man attempts to flip off the camera while taking his mug-shot.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man fresh out of prison tries to prove how tough he is. A drunk woman rages against everyone in her path. programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A woman who was nabbed for jaywalking claims the police were out of line for arresting her. A woman is brought in on domestic-violence charges, and a drug peddler claims he's selling to support his addiction to poker.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: An uncooperative woman is placed in a restraint chair. A troubled woman with a drug addiction is brought in on prostitution charges. One man is taken to a sobering cell to sleep off his intoxication.

programme.title: Jail

programme.title: Jail

programme.desc: By proclaiming that he is a Gulf War Veteran, a man states he should be imprisoned. A corporal investigates a “prisoner on prisoner assault.” An Officer’s last shift is filled with fireworks.

programme.title: Wind The Bobbin Up - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: “Wind the bobbin up. Wind the bobbin up. Pull, pull, clap, clap, clap.” Get up and dance with this super fun version of the traditional English nursery rhyme.

programme.title: Hot Cross Buns - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Here’s one of our favorite traditional nursery rhymes about food, made super simple. Come sing along with the Chef from our “Do You Know The Muffin Man?” and “Pat-A-Cake” videos. Yum yum!

programme.title: Flying Dragon Fruit Cake - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Come forth brave warriors and watch the Bumble Nums catch some Flying Dragon Fruits for their fiery Flying Dragon Fruit Cake! But be careful! They breathe fire and are very fast!

programme.title: Carl's Big Adventure - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Carl is visited by three large, very dirty construction vehicles. But Carl’s Car Wash is not big enough to fit them! Carl has an idea! He can supersize his car wash so the vehicles can get a proper scrub-a-dub-dub. He just needs a few parts. With the help of old friends, Carl sets out on a big adventure to the darkest depths of the ocean, the highest heights in the land, and beyond! Don't miss Carl in his first mini-movie as he pushes himself to the limit in the name of vehicular cleanliness!

programme.title: Where Is Baby? - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Peekaboo! Sing along with this adorable song for kids, “Where Is Baby?” Where is baby? Where is baby? Where is baby? There he is.

programme.title: Finny's First Day Of School - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Finny is a bit nervous on the first day of school, but Myrtle the Turtle is even more anxious and literally hides her shell! Surely Myrtle will come out of her shell when their teacher, a whale named Mr. Magellan, has them draw and present their favorite things to the class! Nope. Myrtle is even more nervous than ever! Being a good friend, Finny helps Myrtle through her anxiety, and the tiny turtle finally shows her drawing to everyone.

programme.title: Baby Shark - Finny The Shark and more
programme.desc: Baby Shark, Mama Shark, Papa Shark, Grandma Shark, and Grandpa Shark are out for a family swim and Baby Shark tries and tries to catch the little fishies but his skills aren’t yet up to the task. Just when he thinks he finally has them a (very big) friend of the little fishies steps in to save the day!

programme.title: Dharma's Digger - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Oh no! While digging deep at a top secret construction site, Dhama’s digger gets splashed with smelly sludge! Everyone says that Carl's Car Wash is the place to get all cleaned up, so Dharma skedaddles over to see how Carl can help. With a quick mess assessment and a few twists of some knobs, Carl’s suds-sational car wash is ready to give Dharma’s vehicle a good scrub-a-dub! Dharma rolls out one happy customer, and ready to get back to work on the site that Carl is itching to see!

programme.title: Mr. Golden Sun - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Mister Sun, Sun, Mr. Golden Sun...please shine down on me! It’s the Mr. Sun song from Super Simple Songs!

programme.title: Finny's First Sleepover - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: It’s Finny’s first sleepover and Finny is nervous to sleep at Myrtle the Turtle’s house. Throughout the night, Finny becomes more and more comfortable and after a spooky story, Finny becomes the bravest of everyone at the sleepover! Finny can't wait to do a sleepover again – but this time, at Finny’s house!

programme.title: Enchanted Ice Cream - Super Simple
programme.desc: Today, the Bumble Nums are going to make Enchanted Ice Cream Sundaes! With a map in hand, Humble, Grumble, and Stumble search the orchard for the secret ingredient … and discover a fairy treehouse leading to an enchanted world! The Bumble Nums travel through the portal…but do they find the ingredient they’re looking for? And can they get it back to the kitchen in time for the Cooking Countdown? Watch and see!

programme.title: Hello Hello! - Super Simple Puppets and more
programme.desc: Sing and dance along with the Super Simple Puppets to “Hello Hello!”! It’s a classic Super Simple action song for kids.

programme.title: Erupting Raspberry Lava Cake - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: The Bumble Nums are making an Erupting Raspberry Lava Cake but the secret ingredient is at the top of Mount Fruity Volcano! Can Humble, Grumble, and Stumble climb the volcano and get what they need before it blows? And can they do it in time for the Cooking Countdown? Watch and see!

programme.title: Let's Go For A Drive! - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Get in on the fun and join Milo in his pretend car for a quick ride. Do you see the ducks crossing the road? How about people walking on the sidewalk? Wait, don't cross on a red light!

programme.title: The Pinocchio - Sing Along With Tobee - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Caitie made a fluffy bird marionette named Fifi! Fifi is full of jokes and Tobee can't stop laughing! Caitie knows another marionette who is just as silly as Fifi. It's Pinocchio! There's even a whole song about him called "The Pinocchio." After Caitie and Tobee sing and dance to the song, Fifi can't help but tell one last joke. And guess what? It quacks Tobee up!

programme.title: Little Billy's Skateboard - Carl's Car Wash and more
programme.desc: The Bubblegum Bandit pulls another bubblegum burglary and is about to escape when Officer Oona bursts his bubble! Moments later, little Billy skates right into the action and his skateboard becomes a gummy mess! Billy hurries to Carl’s Car Wash, but Carl won't clean his skateboard - it's a CAR wash, not a SKATEBOARD wash! Billy does some quick thinking...and his skateboard might just go through the car wash after all!

programme.title: 10 Little Dinosaurs - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: 10 Stegosauruses! 10 Triceratopses! 10 Pterodactyls! 10 Brontosauruses! And 10 Tyrannosaurus Rex! Wow! This Super Simple counting song introduces the numbers 1-10 and also some very cool dinosaur names! Can you say them all?!

programme.title: Super Wings

programme.desc: Jett and Dema have to find a yeti, but there's a panda cub in danger. How will they save him?

programme.desc: Mayta and Jett are ready to draw something big in the ground, but it takes forever. What will Jett and Mayta do?

programme.desc: Tae-Hun's project is finished for the science festival, but Seo-Yoon's robot goes out of control. What will Jett, Tae-Hun, and Seo-Yoon do?

programme.desc: Kian wants to be a giant, but Aiden knocks over Grand Albert's invention, that makes Aiden become a giant. What will Jett, Donnie, Grand Albert, and Kian do?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A dinosaur skeleton is finished to be put in a museum, but a dinosaur skeleton goes after the tow-truck with a magnet. What will Jett, Donnie, Paul, and Justin do?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett, Grand Albert, and Margot go back in time to see a real mammoth, but a mother mammoth thinks they are bad guys, until a mother mammoth gets stuck in the hole in the ice. What will Jett, Grand Albert, Margot, and Erk do?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Archie and Jett have to find a toy alligator. How will Jett and Archie get it back?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jules and his grandmother are making a giant waffle, but Jett accidentally adds too much yeast. Can Donnie stop the disaster?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett is on his way to Fiji to deliver a package to a girl named Tima cause it has what she and her friends need to dance in the Hibiscus Festival. But, suddenly, out of nowhere, a big whale emerged from the sea and swallowed up Jett! Would Jett find a way to get outta the whale and make his delivery?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett is on his way to deliver a package to a boy named Aaron when he is suddenly caught in a terrible storm. He loses his package and is struck by lightning knocking him into the ocean and disabling his communications with World Airport. Can Jett be rescued from the Bermuda Triangle?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Oswald has a big piano concert today, but the large piano is too big for him to play by himself. What will Jett and Oswald do?

programme.desc: Jett, Emilia, and Adash get ready for a dragon festival, but a fly distracts them. How will Jett and Emilia stop the disaster?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett, Max, and his grandfather have to take a giant pumpkin to the pumpkin festival, but a pumpkin rolls away. How will Jett and Max stop the huge pumpkin?

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Take your little explorer on an exotic musical expedition to meet wild animals from across the globe. Journey to the jungle, savannah, desert and forest.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover instruments through narration and repetition. Real-life images and sounds will engage viewers as they dance to upbeat classical favorites from Beethoven, Mozart and more. Join your favorite Baby Einstein characters to discover what makes each instrument unique!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones become increasingly mobile, their fascination with all things that move intensifies too. On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring exposes babies to the different ways people travel -- on land, by sea, and in the air -- while it presents them with captivating real-world images, funny puppet shows, and beautiful classical music by Beethoven, Haydn, Mozart and Rossini.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies grow and change, so does the landscape around them. From fiery red leaves to falling snowflakes; from flowers in bloom to fireworks in July, every season of the year has its own special magic just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Get moving with Baby Einstein! Real, live-action footage and classical melodies engage young viewers as they discover simple words related to movement. Enjoy encouraging melodies and live-action footage of babies and animals as you learn and move alongside your favorite Baby Einstein friends. Dance along as you watch real, live action footage of animals, children, and toys.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: At 12 months, babies can identify specific sounds, and they re also starting to match the sounds they hear with the objects that make them. Meet the Orchestra -- First Instruments presents your little "maestro" with a playful introduction to the sights and sounds of a real orchestra -- from the clashing of cymbals to the purring of the cello and everything in between!

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Learn about the numbers 1,2,3,4 & 5 through rhyme, real-life footage, counting, stories, and repetition - accompanied by classical music and real world imagery.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: From the moment babies are born, they use their developing senses to discover the world. In terms of sight, bold patterns in contrasting colors or black and white are initially preferred. As for sounds, Mother s gentle voice, in any language, is music to baby's ears. Language Nursery: Voices From Many Lands acquaints your baby with the sounds of foreign language by presenting delightful, visually stimulating images accompanied by spoken passages, natural sounds and music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Ocean Explorers
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: The Sandbox
programme.desc: The Sandbox is where our favorite Baby Einstein characters gather to play, problem-solve and have fun. Each five-minute episode explores an area of curiosity relevant to our 2-4 year old audience. Since the four weathered planks of wood that make up the structure of their sandbox are no obstacles for their imaginations, the entire universe is available to them for each new adventure.

programme.title: Manners Manor
programme.desc: Introducing "Manners Manor," a new series from Baby Einstein. Designed to help your child learn all about manners in a fun and thoughtful way. The content is based on "The Einstein Way" - a curiosity-driven learning philosophy, from industry experts, inspired by Montessori and STEAM. It also reflects our core belief that curiosity is the most important skill for our kids to learn in order to be successful and adaptable in an ever-changing world.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover sign language along with your favorite Baby Einstein Characters! Learn how to sign the names of common things from different objects found at home and outside, family, and even your very own neighborhood through repetition and narration. Real-life images of toys and objects along with gentle melodies engage viewers as they learn a variety of different signs.

programme.title: Little Red Car - Popular Songs
programme.desc: Watch this whole bunch of popular songs by the Little Red Car for kids. Hope you enjoy them!

programme.title: Humpty Dumpty Nursery Rhymes and Kids Songs - Farmees
programme.desc: Enjoy Farmees Humpty Dumpty and popular easy to learn nursery rhymes for babies and toddlers, which the children love to sing and dance along with. Learn these kids songs and new words at the same time.

programme.title: Luke and Lily Baby Shark - Shark Song For Kids

programme.desc: Kids songs and nursery rhymes that your little one will love! Come join Super Supremes as they sing and dance in this fun kids video. programme.desc: A cool collection of education videos for preschool kids & babies where they learn the names of color car cartoons like super trucks, helicopters, garbage trucks, ambulance, digger, loader, fire engine, tractor, bus, police car, bulldozer and more. This kids action and adventure show includes different types of transport like street, emergency, army, construction and more vehicles for children.

programme.title: Wheels on the Bus & More Kids Songs (Baby Bao Panda)
programme.desc: Do you kids know Wheels on the Bus? Learn this classic nursery rhyme with Baby Bao Panda, plus many other fun songs and dances.

programme.desc: Ben the fun kids toy train is back with more songs and rhymes like old Macdonald, Alphabet song, phonics abc song, opposites song, incy wincy spider, five little monkeys, finger family etc. This family friendly children's show promotes learning and family bonds.

programme.title: Umi Uzi Halloween Songs for Kids
programme.desc: Umi Uzi is an adorable toddler who loves to go on adventures. She isn't afraid to explore her environment and learn new and important lessons in each episode. Nursery rhymes and children's songs are her favorite way of solving problems and learning new words. Join her this Halloween in this wonderful collection of the most popular scary songs specially made for kids!

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: During a mission to one of Robotnik's factories, Sally is taken prisoner by Robotnik and Snively, who construct a roboti-sized "Sally" clone, complete with Sally's personality, and mannerisms. The double tricks Sonic into rescuing "Sally".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and the Freedom Fighters journey to Robotnik's lab in hopes of deciphering his roboti-sizer system. While underground, Sonic spots his now roboti-sized Uncle Chuck aboard a Badlands bound mine-train and devises a plan for his rescue.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: While on a mission to the big city to replace Nicole's malfunctioning microchip, Sonic and Sally encounter the Guardian, a mysterious cloaked figure who guards a dormant wizard named Lazar and his computer of evil spells.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic is hired into an obvious trap when a frustrated Robotnik decides to appeal to the Hedgehog's ego and announces a "race to determine the fastest on Mobius".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic conquers Robotnik's latest evil - a vehicle designated to locate and destroy living tissue matter - during a solo mission to the Badlands. Upon Sonic's return, the Freedom Fighters honor him with a victory party.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A homecoming is interrupted for Sonic, Sonia and Manic when Sleet and Dingo arrive to collect back taxes after returning to their birthplace.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sleet and Dingo plan to collect the taxes owed to Robotnik from the Duke of Velcronia but keep it for themselves.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The sinister Robotnik blackmails Cyrus, an old friend of Sonic's, by holding his father hostage.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: On a trip to Port Mobius, Sonic, Manic and Sonia are told that ships are sinking due to the Mobian sea-beast.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: While lost in the wastelands of Mobius, Sonic, Manic and Sonia stumble upon an oasis called Lake Valley Resort.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonia is invited to a debutante ball, but before she can be officially announced to society, she and her brothers, Manic and Sonic have an important mission.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik organizes a track meet to lure Sonic into a trap.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs find out that Sonia has inherited a castle. She basks in the idea of having a castle for headquarters.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic joins up with a group of Dr. Robotnik's rejects who have been banished to the dump and helps them understand that their shortcomings were really their strenghs.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Mobius is suffering a crime spree and all the evidence points to Sonic as the culprit. But the real thief is a lab rat wearing a high-tech vehicle suit who was sent by Robotnik to discredit our hero.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: In Rainbow Village, people are busy preparing for a dance marathon, a competition in which all of the villagers participate. Ling Ling is very sad that Ellie decided not to participate. Ellie is not a confident dancer so she doesn't want to participate. // Rainbow Ruby's friends tell her that they are now friends with Felicia. They were playing hide and seek but Felicia is such a good hider that she's refused to come out even though she's won the game.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Princess Kiki is asleep, UP IN THE AIR! According to the note that Kiki left behind, a princess falls under a spell from time to time and in order to break it, they need to play the music box nearby Kiki. But the music box is broken. // Rainbow Ruby and Choco discover cars moving in every direction. Ling Ling asks Rainbow Ruby for help and she uses her magic suitcase to become a police officer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that today is Noodle Festival day in the village but there is a problem. The problem is that the noodle tree, which grows noodles, decided to take a year off and is not growing any noodles this year. // Ling Ling and the friends are worried about the discouraged Gina. Gina just announced that she will stop doing somersaults anymore because she accidentally hurt her friends while practicing.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that Rainbow Village friends were playing around the Rainbow fountain to cool off from the heat but water suddenly stopped coming out of the fountain. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a plumber and starts fixing the fountain. // Kiki's face has turned purple because she ate magical Plumen berries. Kiki accidentally picked magical Plumen berries instead of the delicious rainbow berries she was trying to gather.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ellie's and Jessy's hair are a complete mess after Felicia accidentally causes some Rainbow fruit to fall on them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a hairdresser. // It's winter in Rainbow Village. Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that last night a huge ice mountain appeared so everyone is enjoying an ice sculpture festival. But Jessy seems to have a toothache.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The ground is all wet in Rainbow Village. What's going on? The friends tell Ruby that Jessy's tears have soaked the ground. Jessy accidentally ate Ellie's magic beans and became as huge as a giant. // Thunderbell is very sad because his best friend, Mr. Sloth, is angry at him. Rainbow Ruby thinks up the best way to apologize to Mr. Sloth, who loves performances. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a choreographer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell, Ellie, and Kiki are looking hard for something. It turns out that when Thunderbell was trying on Kiki's crown, he accidentally dropped it and a gem went missing. Kiki sadly says that a princess' crown is worthless without a jewel. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that this year they won't be able to enjoy the traditional rainbow dumplings as the recipe was accidentally torn to pieces. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a chef.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Village friends are on a train and they are concerned that the train won't stop. The engine is even smoking! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a firefighter. // Paige is extremely upset. It turns out that she's been preparing an awesome fashion show but now it had to be cancelled because Gina accidentally spilled a bunch of fruit onto the stage.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Village friends are gathered together at the lake to surf on the Rainbow wave that only comes once a year and they need some help. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a lifeguard and helps her friends safely enjoy their surfing. // Thunderbell is looking extremely worried. It turns out that his pet fish has gone missing. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a detective and finds out Thunderbell's pet fish's whereabouts.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: A welcome party for Prince Frederick is taking place in Rainbow Village, but the guest of honour isn't having any fun at all. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a party planner. // The village is a total mess from the paint that spilled from up above. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a clean-up engineer and starts cleaning with her friends.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: A Flower Festival is underway in Rainbow Village and Ling Ling has called Rainbow Ruby to help her judge the "best flower" contest. But just as Rainbow Ruby starts looking around at the flowers, Kiki's pet dog Pom Pom starts acting unusual and running around frantically, destroying the festival! // Gina and Jessy are with a huge fish that's injured by the lake. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Marine Biologist. Rainbow Ruby uses her encyclopedia to find out that the fish is actually a dolphin.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Everyone is frightened because some visiting birds keep trying to sit on their heads. According to Chirpee, the birds just enjoy sitting on people's heads. Rainbow Ruby designs hats where the birds can comfortably sit without disturbing the villagers. // The village friends were planning to have some fun with the rainbow fish but they're all disappointed to discover that the lake has frozen over.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The friends are very tired because Mr. Moon hasn't come to sing them their nightly lullaby. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an Astronaut and flies to space to look for Mr. Moon with her friends. // In Rainbow Village, a super frantic Thunderbell is high up in the air, trapped inside a giant bubble. Thunderbell got trapped in a giant bubble in the middle of a bubble bath. In order to find out a way to bring Thunderbell back to earth, Rainbow Ruby turns into a scientist.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell is sad because he's discovered a new fruit and eaten all of it. Now there's none left and he'll never be able to eat that fruit again. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a farmer. // Thunderbell has a terrible tummy ache. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Microbiologist to find out why Thunderbell is sick. Rainbow Ruby uses a microscope to find a bacterium inside the cheesecake Thunderbell had but Felicia accidentally casts a spell that makes the bacterium gigantic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling takes Rainbow Ruby to Ellie's cabin where she meets mischievous baby stars that fell from the sky. The baby stars were playing together, got separated from their mother and ended up in Rainbow Village. // Kiki is extremely upset because the jewel Prince Frederick gave her as a gift broke. The friends try to glue the broken pieces together but it doesn't work. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a jewelry designer and tries designing jewelry with the broken pieces.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When Ruby and Choco arrive at the village, they find a very worried looking Ling Ling. Gina, Ellie, and Thunderbell went camping in Rainbow Forest but they saw a monster in the forest, got scared and had to run away. // Ruby is struggling to make a doll with her dad. Ruby and Choco get their suitcase and as Ruby swings her umbrella, there they are, in front of Rainbow fountain. Mayor Ling Ling tells her that today is the day of Princess Kiki's ballet performance.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Apple's rave review on her berryweb page of Strawberry's new dessert starts a booming mail order dessert business for Berry Bitty City. When Strawberry's stuffed-up nose makes her bake a bad-tasting cake, Apple, afraid the truth will hurt Strawberry's reputation, proclaims it's delicious. The fib snowballs when the Queen of Berryvania reads Apple's review and orders Strawberry's new cake for her ball.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)
programme.desc: It's winter and the pond's frozen and that means Strawberry and friends can ice skate! They decide to showcase their talents at an Ice Dance Show. But just then, a new kid named Apricot shows up.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)
programme.desc: When Strawberry & her friends decide to put on a talent show, they plan to enter themselves as a band, The Strawberry Jams!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry ordered some Zippy Gro daisy seeds and planted them in her garden. She is surprised that they've sprouted in less than a day despite their descriptive moniker. Strawberry comes by to admire them and Blueberry is reminded that the new cookbook Strawberry ordered has arrived. Strawberry is excited to try out the new corn muffin recipe, as its level of difficulty will be a challenge for her. Strawberry follows the muffin recipe, mixes the ingredients, and double checks it.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berrykins Ed and Earl report to Princess Berrykin and Strawberry that they are certain there is a monster in the berry patch! They saw something with many noses and many tails making weird noises in the bushes. But upon further investigation by Strawberry and her friends, it is discovered that friendly boy Huckleberry Pie was driving his pet-mobile of orphan dogs through the countryside, took a wrong turn and got stuck near Berry Bitty City.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Orange wants to spend the day teaching her puppy to fetch, but the frisky little gal doesn't seem to understand the "retrieve" part of the activity-as soon as she gets the ball, she runs out of sight and returns moments later without it. Orange gets a new ball and tries again, with the same results. Over and over, until Orange is out of balls. Puzzled and frustrated that she can't find where her pup has stashed them, she goes to enlist her friends to help her search.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is being driven to distraction! She can't finish a song that she promised to write for a singing group, thanks to the earsplitting noise from Berrykin construction crews who are trying to find the sparkleberry juice blockage that has shut down the town's power. Strawberry can't cook in the café, Lemon's hair salon appliances are running out of control-life in Berry Bitty City is impossible!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: With the power completely out in Berry Bitty City, the girls go on a camping trip to be out of the way of the Berrykin work crews. Lemon is nervous because she believes there is a creepy creature in the forest (that she read about in a book Blueberry loaned her), and the girls get the nervous bug, but Strawberry turns their apprehension into fun by daring her friends to stay out in the woods the longest!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: The girls are driven to distraction by their frisky puppies frolicking all over Berry Bitty City! Full of energy and thinking that everything in town is a toy for them to play with, they cause comical mayhem wherever they go. Strawberry suggests the pups need a place of their own where they can play, a dog park! The girls decide to call in Huckleberry, who runs an animal hotel in Berry Big City, to help design the park.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: To convince the dance-averse Huckleberry to attend the big masquerade ball at the dog park, Blueberry promises she'll stay by his side the whole evening and make sure he doesn't have to dance. But as the day of the ball dawns, Blueberry awakens with a bad cold. She doesn't know how to tell Huck that she can't go to the ball. Lemon and Raspberry misinterpret her sniffles, thinking she's so heartbroken to be disappointing Huck that she's crying!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City is abuzz as Berrykin Bloom introduces the biggest, juiciest, strangest fruit anyone has ever seen! It's the size of a house, shaped like a strawberry, colored like a watermelon and has a spiky pineapple top. "I call it the sparklestrawwaterpineberry!" says Berrykin Bloom. Princess Berrykin declares it the greatest achievement in Berryculture she's ever witnessed.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Lemon and Raspberry hire twins Sweet & Sour to help out in Strawberry's café, so Strawberry will have time to appear in an internet fashion contest.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry's world-traveling cousin Apple Dumplin' stops at Berry Bitty City. What starts as a brief visit becomes a series of comical misadventures that ends with Apple finding a new home with Strawberry and her friends.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Lemon and Raspberry's fashion podcast is saved by Apple, then almost sabotaged by Sweet and Sour when Lemon's "mood hair" runs amok, acting like the bickering twins, and the twins' comical argument is accidentally broadcast on the "berrynet."

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry is at Orange's store to mail a birthday card to a friend in Big Bitty City. Just after she drops the card into the mail slot, an ill postal carrier bee sneezes sending envelopes and post cards flying in all directions. The two girls help Jadeybug, a postal clerk, and Postmaster Bee gather up the strewn letters and the ill bee gets sent home from work.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Raspberry is distraught when she suspects her friends have copied her design on her lantern for the "Glimmerberry Gathering".

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: A mysterious paper airplane flies into the park, inspiring the children to talk about all things Airplanes! The children let their creativity fly when they use their imaginations to build their very own airplane.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: The possibilities are endless as Barney and the kids use their imagination to bring their drawings to life. Barney and the children have an island adventure by imagining themselves in Lauras picture, transporting them to a sunny island!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Celebrate the things that make us special! Barney and his friends discover that trying something new can be fun. Jackson treats everyone to his healthy but unusual snack, while Baby Bop has a special picnic for BJ consisting mostly of her favorite foods.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney helps Baby Bop see that winter can be a wonderful time for fun. Then, when she least expects itthe snow begins to fall! Barney and his friends are decorating the caboose for Christmas when Barney decides to plan a Secret Santa game. Everyone has to buy or make a gift for the friend whose name they have drawn.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Riff decides to create a musical zoo when their zoo trip is postponed. Gathering instruments that sound like real animals, Riff gives Barney and his friends a zoo-mazing experience. Baby Bop enjoys her homemade boat but wants to ride in a big one. Barney shows her boats on the computer, while BJ and Riff prepare a surprise. When they return, a sailing ship awaits Baby Bop on the playset!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Melanie is sad because she misses her friend, Marisa who is visiting relatives in India. Barney takes her and the other kids on a trip to the magic caboose to visit pretend countries like Egypt, Tahiti, and India. Barney and the little dinosaurs enjoy an Art Festival. BJ and Riff share some musical art and Baby Bop shares a painting of a very special friendBarney!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When some of the children invite Barney to join them for a race, BJ and Baby Bop decide hell need their help. By the end of the day, everyone finds out that there are many fun ways to exercise. Baby Bop cant wait for BJ and Riff to go on their camping trip so she can have Barney and the park all to herself! But, once theyre gone, she discovers that as more time that goes by, the more she misses them!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney is snacking on pistachios...and just can't seem to stop! His friends try to help. An unexpected avalanche of pistachios convinces Barney that his friends may be right. BJ has a dream after eating too many sweets, where he eats as many sweets as he wants and ends up with a big stomachache. When he wakes up, hes happy to find out it was only a dream. When he asks for a healthy snack, his friends are happy to oblige.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When Baby Bop becomes a little bossy playing with her friends, Barney teaches her that being bossy isn't a nice way to treat your friends. Riff feels terrible when he accidentally wrecks BJs beloved scooter. BJ loved that scooter more than almost anything! Riff and Baby Bop decide to have a sale in the park to raise money to buy BJ a brand-new scooter.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop is having a hard time finding a story she hasn't heard before. Barney and the dinos decide to tell her an old story with a new twist...by singing Little Red Riding Hood! When a wheelchair-bound child is unintentionally neglected by his friends, Barney steps in to help. He reminds the others to include the child by showing them that even Barney feels excluded sometimes. In the end, everyone is included for a day of fun!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop is sad because she lost her pet caterpillar, Monty. Barney and the others try to help her find it. Baby Bop is surprised to discover Monty inside a chrysalis. Everyone is excited to find Monty now a beautiful butterfly! Rachel carelessly litters in the park then later has a dream about animals who talk. With Barney and the animals help, Rachel learns that the park is home to many. Rachel realizes the importance of nature and of keeping our earth clean!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ receives a letter from his pen pal in China revealing that his pen pal will be coming to visit. With the help of friends, BJ hurries to get the park ready. He wants it decorated so his pen pal feels right at home. BJ soon learns that his pen pal wants to see how BJ really lives. Barney has a tee-rific surprise for BJ and Baby Bop. Cousin Riff is moving to town!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ is pretending to be a great detective and a case quickly comes his way when something nibbles on one of Baby Bops healthy snacks. BJ, Barney, and Baby Bop uncover several clues along the way and soon realize the culprit is a pet rabbit. When Riff hears a mysterious sound in the park, he plays detective. Along the way, they explore the sense of sound while identifying sounds of nature and the neighborhood.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop wants everyone to play with her instead of working in their garden. They promise to play with her as soon as they finish. Baby Bop can't wait, and tries many ways to get them to come play with her now. When her friends do come to play, they have a tea party and enjoy some of the fresh things from the garden. Riff invents a Happiness Machine to try to cheer up a sad little girl. But it's her friends, not the machine, that make her happy!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Everyone loves Barney! When Ryan tries to be just like Barney, he has a hard time filling Barney's shoes. Ryan soon learns that he is special when he's just being himself! Barney's friends are having a hard time deciding what to do because everyone wants to do the same thing! Barney's Native American tale, The Chase, shows them that it's best to think for themselves and not follow the crowd.
